Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Plaintiffs Action Pending The Outcome Of Arbitration
Off Calendar Jan-02-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michael Freiman, Esq. 310-917-1022 of the Law Office of Michael Freiman for Plaintiff through Court Call.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES INC.'s Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Plaintiffs Action Pending The Outcome Of Arbitration.

Defendant Uber's motion to compel arbitration and stay is GRANTED. No opposition filed. The court will sign the proposed order.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Newton Lam, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/NL)
